S.FORM: == tatu' == tatu' ru qabay ga mtnaq, te kyahu na nqwaq.
S.PHON: == tatuʔ == tatuʔ ru qaβaj ɣa mtnaq, te kjaħu na nqwaq.
S.FORM: == tatu' == tatu' ru qabay ga mtnaq, te kyahu na nqwaq.
S.PHON: == tatuʔ == tatuʔ ru qaβaj ɣa mtnaq, te kjaħu na nqwaq.
